title: Event Highlights | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Event Highlights
Apr 17 2025Probability Conference Gathers Top MathematiciansThe second NYU Shanghai – Peking – Westlake Probability Conference was held on April 10 - 12. Conference & Symposium
Apr 17 2025Joanna Waley-Cohen’s Lifetime Engagement with China Exhibition “A Lifetime Engagement,” featuring photos from her 1973 trip and her time at NYU Shanghai, is on displayTalks
Mar 21 2025New ICA Exhibition Explores History and MemoryThe exhibition features figurative paintings made in the past five years and examines how these artworks reflect the time and place they were created.Institute of Contemporary Arts Exhibition
Mar 20 2025Prospective Students Visit Campus for Candidate WeekendNYU Shanghai’s flagship admissions event, Candidate Weekends are a crucial part of NYU Shanghai’s admissions process for Chinese national applicants.Student
Mar 5 2025Shanghai Stories: Promoting Study Away at NYU ShanghaiAn event was held in New York on Feb 26 to promote NYU Shanghai as a study away destination.Community
Feb 19 2025Frontiers Science Center: Year in Review, Future in FocusThe Frontiers Science Center convened its Second Academic Committee Meeting. Research
Jan 6 2025Setting the Stage for Serendipity: Event Sparks Collaboration Across NYU’s Global Network42 faculty members convened at NYU Abu Dhabi for the inaugural Serendipity Research Confluence.ResearchExternal
Dec 11 2024US Ambassador to China Nicholas Burns Visits NYU ShanghaiThe University was honored to host Ambassador Burns and his delegation on December 10.TalksStudent
Dec 5 2024VINS Conference Examines Green FinanceThe Volatility Institute held its ninth annual conference.Conference & Symposium
Dec 5 2024NYU Shanghai Hosts 2nd Leg of Sino-Foreign University CupNYU Shanghai currently ranks 2nd in the SFUC with last leg of the tournament set for March 2025 at DKU.CommunityStudent
Nov 21 2024Embracing Advocacy and True Allyship at Ally WeekThis was NYU Shanghai’s 10th annual Ally Week.CommunityStudent
Nov 20 2024Architect Wang Shu in Dialogue with NYU ShanghaiThe architect gave a lecture touching on the relation between architecture, the passage of time, and human life. TalksCommunity
Nov 14 2024Research Excellence: 2024 Undergraduate Research SymposiumPresentations by 31 student research groups showcased the research they have been working on with faculty in business, humanities, social sciences, and STEM. ResearchStudent
Nov 13 2024NYU Shanghai New Bund Campus Garners AIA International 2024 Design AwardsThe campus was awarded the Merit Award for Architecture and two other recognitions by AIAThe New Bund Campus
Oct 31 2024Peter Singer Speaks at NYU Shanghai on the Ethics of What We EatThe renowned philosopher talked about moral philosophy, animal ethics, and multi-species careTalks
